review_text: Great experience with . The app is simple, smooth, and very easy to use. It helps in managing investments efficiently, and transactions are quick and reliable. One of the best features is getting cashback on UPI transactions, which adds extra value for daily use. Overall, a very useful and trustworthy app. Highly recommended!

"INDmoney is an exceptional all-in-one financial super-app. It simplifies tracking my entire net worth, from Indian stocks and mutual funds to EPF and bank balances, all in one sleek dashboard. The standout feature is the seamless US stock investing, allowing fractional shares with zero brokerage. The interface is intuitive, and the real-time insights into my spending and investment goals are incredibly helpful.

Don’t use this application. It’s very poor. in futures and options, nothing is as user-friendly as Zerodha. They have added too many features and now the app doesn’t work properly. It’s very slow and takes a long time to process. In today’s world, who would like something that works like a tortoise?

Been using INDmoney since 2024 and the evolution is wild. As a 23yo CS grad, I really appreciate how much smoother the UI and tracking have gotten lately. One big suggestion for the devs you guys should seriously look into SnapTrade. It’s a solid brokerage integration platform that would take tracking to the next level. I know you already have your own in-house setup for tracking external brokers, but integrating SnapTrade would help way more people sync their portfolios Smooth and glitch-free.

Previously I provided 1 star due to clutter in the UI/UX experience but within a couple of days, I received a call from Mr.Chetan from the design department, and he collected all my feedback and provided assurance that all the changes will be implemented soon. I haven't seen any company that is contacting the customer and really trying to improve their platform. Kudos to Chetan for listening to the customer. and also it's good app to use Ind stocks, US stocks and MF at single unified platform.

Worst trading app experience. Frequent crashes caused major losses. On 23-03-2026, I placed an order at ₹66 with stop-loss ₹59, but it failed to trigger. I had to exit manually at ₹49.65. Orders often don’t appear on charts. Highly unreliable—do not use for trading. I also escalate the same to SEBI too
